title: Propellant property lookup tables for AstraForge thermal analysis

data_generation.reason: The table is formatted for AstraForge f(T,p) lookup. Use official NIST WebBook/REFPROP export for traceable design data.

rp1_surrogate_note: This file uses n-Dodecane as a simple single-component RP-1 proxy. The NIST RP-1 surrogate is a four-component mixture: alpha-methyldecalin, n-dodecane, 5-methylnonane, and heptylcyclohexane. Use REFPROP for that mixture if you need higher fidelity.

records.note: n-Dodecane is only a simple single-component RP-1 proxy. NIST RP-1 surrogate models are multi-component.
